channel.title: Video Streaming in C++
channel.description: Recent content on Video Streaming in C++

item.title: About me
item.description:
Networking solutions specialist with extensive experience in video and game streaming technologies, including MPEG-DASH, HLS, WebRTC, MoQ, HESP and RTSP, hands-on work with FFmpeg, GStreamer, and C/C++ in building and optimizing high-performance streaming systems.

Strong background in embedded Linux, multithreading, and performance optimization, experience with GPU-based processing and hardware acceleration (CUDA).

Experience with modern video codecs, including H.264, H.265, H.266, AV1, and VP9, image processing using OpenCV.

Deep networking expertise across TCP/IP and UDP, and implementation of reliability mechanisms such as Forward Error Correction (FEC).

item.title: is_one_of in C++20: fold expressions and concepts in practice
item.description: A short example of the is_one_of helper built using fold expressions and C++20 concepts.
